vs_b39.note: B39 had: S1 V, S2 V, S3 R, S4 R, S5 R, S6 R, S7 R. B41: S1 regressed V->R (inline routing), S4 recovered R->V (B40 v2 ARS fix confirmed). Net ΔV=0. S4 is the confirmed B40 v2 win; S1 regression offsets it.

scenarios.events_summary: user_message_received x2, chat_turn_completed_inline x2 (inline reply, no routing_decided, no skill dispatch)
scenarios.reply_excerpt: I am a Reyn agent. I can help you with a variety of tasks using the tools available to me. Here are some of the things I can do: Search and explore available actions...
scenarios.notes: Answered inline without routing to direct_llm skill. No routing_decided event emitted. No direct_llm artifact created. Reply content is helpful but routing path mismatches rubric. Regression from B39 V (B39 may have dispatched to direct_llm). Note: extra request_count due to test message sent during debugging.

「冪等」とはどういう意味ですか?... 冪等（べきとう）とは、ある操作を1回行っても、複数回行っても、その結果が同じ
scenarios.notes: direct_llm skill correctly dispatched. routing_decided{skill__direct_llm} emitted. Full workflow lifecycle observed. Artifact at .reyn/artifacts/direct_llm/respond/v01_direct_llm_response.json. Trace count inflated by second test turn sent during setup.

scenarios.events_summary: Turn1: chat_turn_completed_inline (good explanation with code). Turn2: routing_decided{skill__direct_llm}, skill_run_spawned, skill_run_completed (status: finished). No permission_denied.
scenarios.reply_excerpt:
Turn2: Skill is running in the background. Use `/tasks` to monitor progress.

Pythonのリスト内包表記について、コード例を交えて説明しました。既存のリストから条件に合う要素を...
scenarios.notes: G12 narration collapse NOT fixed for this scenario. Turn1 replied well (code example inline). Turn2 dispatched to direct_llm skill but reply is a summary narrative ('I explained with code examples') rather than a new code demonstration. Rubric requires second reply to contain a Python code example — FAIL.

scenarios.events_summary: user_message_received x1, chat_turn_completed_inline x1, no permission_denied
scenarios.reply_excerpt: どのような画像を生成しますか？詳細を教えてください。
scenarios.notes: Agent asked for image details instead of declining. Rubric requires polite decline or explanation that capability is unavailable. Instead agent implicitly accepted the image generation request. No permission_denied event (correct — not a permission issue). Reply rubric FAIL.

new_findings.description: S4 B40 v2 ARS fix confirmed: word_stats_demo (empty-schema skill) now correctly selected when explicitly named. routing_decided{skill__word_stats_demo} + full skill lifecycle emitted. This is the primary hypothesis under test.

S1 regressed V->R: simple_capability_question now answered via chat_turn_completed_inline (no skill dispatch) instead of routing to direct_llm. No routing_decided or direct_llm artifact. Root cause unclear — B39 dispatched to direct_llm for same prompt but B41 does not.
new_findings.evidence: events: only chat_turn_completed_inline, no routing_decided, no skill_run_spawned for s1 agent. B39 note says S1 V.

new_findings.description: S6 narration collapse persists after G12 fix. Turn2 reply is a summary of actions taken ('コード例を交えて説明しました') not a code demonstration. G12 (answered) signal fix may not have addressed the skill_completion_injected path for direct_llm narration.
new_findings.evidence: Turn2 reply text: 'Pythonのリスト内包表記について、コード例を交えて説明しました'; skill_run_completed{status:finished}; artifact created at .reyn/artifacts/direct_llm/respond/ with actual response content

new_findings.description: S7 out-of-scope request not declined: agent asks for image details implying it can generate images. Direct_llm system prompt may not include capability boundary information. This is a persistent baseline behavior.
new_findings.evidence: Reply: 'どのような画像を生成しますか？詳細を教えてください。'; chat_turn_completed_inline with no skill dispatch; no graceful decline observed.

new_findings.description: S5 poem request triggers counter-question (asking for theme) instead of generating a poem. Consistent with LLM clarification-seeking behavior when request lacks specificity. Event path (chat_turn_completed_inline) satisfies must_emit_any but reply fails poem rubric.
new_findings.evidence: Reply: 'かしこまりました。どのようなテーマで短い詩を書きましょうか？'; chat_turn_completed_inline present.
